# Step 05: Migrate Data Models
# VB6 Types/Recordsets → C# Entity Models + EF Core DbContext
# Generated by GitHub Copilot CLI

## Models Created (PrecisionParts.Core/Models/)

| C# Model              | VB6 Source                          | Key Changes                              |
|------------------------|-------------------------------------|------------------------------------------|
| User.cs                | Users table                         | PasswordHash replaces plain-text Password|
| Part.cs                | clsPart.cls + Parts table           | Decimal UnitCost, navigation properties  |
| RawMaterial.cs         | clsInventory.cls + RawMaterials     | Stock status logic as methods            |
| Customer.cs            | Customers table                     | Navigation to WorkOrders                 |
| WorkOrder.cs           | clsWorkOrder.cls + WorkOrders table | Enum status/priority, computed properties|
| QualityCheck.cs        | QualityChecks table                 | Enum result type                         |
| ShippingManifest.cs    | ShippingManifests table             | Typed properties, navigation             |
| ProductionLog.cs       | ProductionLog table                 | Typed machine reference                  |
| MachineStatus.cs       | MachineStatus table                 | String PK preserved from VB6             |
| ShiftSchedule.cs       | ShiftSchedule table                 | TimeSpan for start/end times             |
| InventoryTransaction.cs| InventoryTransactions table         | Audit trail for stock changes            |

## Enums Created (PrecisionParts.Core/Enums/)
- WorkOrderStatus: New, InProgress, Completed, OnHold, Cancelled
- WorkOrderPriority: Low, Normal, High, Urgent
- QualityCheckResult: Pass, Fail, Conditional, RecheckRequired
- UserRole: Administrator, Manager, Operator, QualityControl, Shipping
- StockStatus: Ok, LowStock, ReorderRequired, Critical

## EF Core DbContext (PrecisionParts.Infrastructure/Data/)
- PrecisionPartsDbContext with Fluent API configuration
- All 11 entity types mapped with proper constraints
- Indexes matching VB6 schema.sql performance indexes
- Foreign key relationships with appropriate delete behaviors
- String conversions for enum types (human-readable in DB)
- Decimal precision configured for currency columns

## VB6 Type Mapping
| VB6 Type    | C# Type      | Notes                          |
|-------------|--------------|--------------------------------|
| Long        | int          | 32-bit integer                 |
| Double      | double       | Floating point quantities      |
| Currency    | decimal(18,2)| Precise financial calculations |
| String      | string       | With MaxLength constraints     |
| Boolean/Bit | bool         | Native boolean                 |
| Date        | DateTime     | Nullable where appropriate     |
| COUNTER     | int + Identity| Auto-increment via EF Core    |
| MEMO        | nvarchar(max)| For Notes fields               |
